title: 'Elah #0425
definition:
Elah = "An oak"

 1) an Edomite chief
 2) a king of Israel for two years, son of Baasha
 3) the father of king Hoshea of Israel
 4) a son of Caleb
 5) son of Uzzi
nasbUsage:
Definition: Elah = "An oak"

 1) an Edomite chief
 2) a king of Israel for two years, son of Baasha
 3) the father of king Hoshea of Israel
 4) a son of Caleb
 5) son of Uzzi

    NASB:  terebinth, an Isr. name, also an Edomite name
